description: Resolve the issue where push notifications fail to deliver on Android 14 devices, affecting approximately 8% of users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an Android 14 user WHEN a notification is sent THEN it should be delivered successfully without manual intervention.

description: Optimize the notification delivery process to reduce the 95th percentile latency from 340ms to under 200ms.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a notification is sent WHEN measured THEN the p95 delivery latency should be under 200ms.

description: Implement a three-tier notification priority system (urgent, normal, low) to help users distinguish between critical alerts and routine updates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user receives notifications WHEN a notification is sent THEN it should display the correct priority level (urgent, normal, low).

story_title: Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories
description: Create a user preference page that allows users to opt in/out of specific notification categories (marketing, product updates, etc.).
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the notification preferences page WHEN they select categories THEN their preferences should be saved and respected.

description: Set up monitoring and alerting for notification delivery performance metrics, including latency and delivery success rates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is set up WHEN performance metrics are collected THEN alerts should trigger for any anomalies.

description: Develop a machine learning model to batch low-priority notifications into a digest format, optimizing delivery timing based on user engagement patterns.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user has low-priority notifications WHEN the ML model processes them THEN they should be batched and delivered at optimal times.

story_title: Collect User Feedback on Notification Preferences
description: Implement a feedback mechanism to gather user preferences regarding notification timing and content.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the feedback form WHEN they submit their preferences THEN the data should be recorded for analysis.

story_title: Improve Accessibility Features in Notification Center
description: Enhance the design of the notification center to address accessibility challenges for screen reader users and colorblind individuals.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the notification center WHEN using a screen reader THEN all notifications should be read correctly and clearly.

description: Create documentation to ensure compliance with accessibility standards and privacy regulations related to notifications.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN compliance documentation is created WHEN reviewed THEN it should meet all required standards.

description: Conduct an experiment to test different notification timings to optimize user engagement and click-through rates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a notification timing experiment is conducted WHEN users receive notifications THEN engagement metrics should be tracked and analyzed.
